title: Cherry Blossom Iron Golem
description: Replaces the iron golem’s flowers with cherry blossoms for a softer, more atmospheric look
body:
# What has changed?

The iron golem’s flowers have been visually updated to use cherry blossom textures that match the vanilla cherry grove color palette. The change is subtle and preserves the golem’s iconic look while helping it blend more naturally into cherry biome environments.

# Impact on gameplay

This pack is purely cosmetic and does not affect gameplay or mechanics in any way. It is designed to integrate seamlessly with vanilla textures, making it suitable for both survival worlds and modpacks.

# Comparison between Vanilla and Cherry

![Comprassion of Vanilla and Cherry Blossom Iron Golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/101d2db1166fec7cecb410bc2ede2ab4afc92a54.png)

**You can find more screenshots in the gallery.**
